reproducibility.detail: Clean Linux and Windows default gates passed for immutable implementation commit 061a6f3, and both jobs verified that the gate did not modify tracked files.
evidence: Release Gate run 29653598275 SUCCESS
Linux default gate job 88103958542 SUCCESS
Windows default gate job 88103958521 SUCCESS
Extended Linux job skipped as configured

static_correctness.detail: Lint, typecheck, production build, release ownership checks, Golden Dataset validation, and the default release gate pass.
evidence: Release tests 66/66 PASS
Golden Dataset 8/8 PASS
Web lint PASS
Web typecheck PASS
Web production build PASS
Default Release Gate 22 passed, 0 failed, 1 expected skip

public_contracts.detail: The server owns all public panda facts while the preferences module is the sole application localStorage boundary and persists only stable profile IDs plus local timestamps.
evidence: Localized My Pandas route loads the versioned public Release on the server
Browser storage payload is limited to version, saved {id, at}, and recent {id, at}
Application localStorage ownership gate PASS
Legacy saved slugs migrate to stable profile IDs
No account, authentication, cloud sync, analytics, ranking, or recommendation profile is introduced

media_and_content_truth.detail: Names, status, current place, links, and release identity are resolved from the current public Release; stale IDs are disclosed without restoring public facts from browser cache.
evidence: No public profile facts are persisted in browser storage
Unavailable stable IDs render an explicit removable disclosure
No new media or unsupported claims are introduced
No-JavaScript mode preserves privacy explanation and ordinary archive navigation

browser_journeys.detail: Saved profiles, recent visits, migration, sorting, clearing, stale IDs, locale switching, no-JavaScript behavior, keyboard operation, and narrow text-resize reflow pass against both the immutable Staging deployment and the approved Production deployment.
evidence: My Pandas Staging targeted journeys 8/8 PASS
Full Staging browser smoke shard 1: 39/39 PASS
Full Staging browser smoke shard 2: 36/36 PASS
Full Staging browser smoke total: 75/75 PASS
Production My Pandas targeted journeys 8/8 PASS against https://www.zhipanda.com
Production full browser smoke 75/75 PASS against https://www.zhipanda.com
A prior full run had one transient net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED; the affected file then passed 10/10 before the clean 75/75 rerun
320 CSS pixel plus simulated 200-percent text resize journey PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English My Pandas surfaces and the complete public journey matrix pass automated WCAG A/AA checks on both Staging and Production.
evidence: Staging automated accessibility 40/40 PASS
Production automated accessibility 40/40 PASS against https://www.zhipanda.com
Chinese and English My Pandas desktop Axe checks PASS
Chinese and English My Pandas mobile Axe checks PASS
Keyboard controls and live feedback coverage PASS

visual_regression.detail: Named bilingual semantic visual review for the My Pandas desktop, mobile, populated, empty, and stale-ID states is not recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The localized My Pandas route remains within its reproducible JavaScript and initial-transfer budgets.
evidence: My Pandas First Load JS 111 kB
JavaScript gzip 111194 of 143360 bytes
Initial static asset transfer 129852 of 512000 bytes
My Pandas performance budget is part of the default release gate

release_decision.detail: Production was explicitly approved and deployed with passing automated verification, but the formal Public Beta evidence decision remains BLOCKED until named bilingual visual and manual screen-reader sign-off are recorded.
